tabpfn.rationale: Layer 17 is optimal (critical - 1), where representation maintains 0.68 CKA with input before divergence cliff at layer 18

tabicl.rationale: Layer 8 is optimal (critical - 1), where representation maintains 0.66 CKA with input before divergence cliff at layer 9

tabicl_v2.rationale: Layer 9 (ICL block 8) is optimal — CKA plateau at 0.736 before drop to 0.655 at L10. Gradual decline (no sharp cliff); first big late drop at L9->L10 (-0.081). 51 datasets, cls+reg.

mitra.rationale: Layer 10 is optimal (critical - 1), where representation maintains 0.87 CKA with input before divergence cliff at layer 11
mitra.regression_rationale: Regressor checkpoint has critical depth at L12 (92.3%) with zero variance across 13 datasets. Layer 11 maintains CKA=0.77 with input.

tabdpt.rationale: Layer 13 is optimal (critical - 1), where representation maintains 0.73 CKA with input before divergence cliff at layer 14

carte.rationale: Layer 1 is optimal (critical - 1), where representation maintains 0.50 CKA with input before divergence cliff at layer 1

hyperfast.rationale: Layer 1 is optimal (critical - 1), where representation maintains 1.00 CKA with input before divergence cliff at layer 2

tabula8b.rationale: Layer 18 is optimal (critical - 1), where representation maintains 0.38 CKA with input before divergence cliff at layer 19
